name: Boston Banana Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Bananas, cut into 1/4 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease bottom of 9-inch pie pan.
3. Line bottom with waxed paper and grease again.
4. In a large bowl, blend together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, milk, butter, vanilla, and egg until moistened.
5. Beat on medium speed for 2 minutes.
6. Pour into pie pan and bake for 20-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool for 5 minutes, then invert onto a wire rack and remove waxed paper. Allow to cool completely.
8. Split horizontally into two thin layers.
9. For filling: In a medium saucepan, mix together sugar, flour, and salt. Gradually stir in milk until boiling. Stir constantly until mixture is bubbly. Remove from heat and blend 1/4 cup hot mixture into egg mixture back into the saucepan. Cook until bubbly, stirring constantly. Remove from heat and stir in butter and vanilla.
10. Cool filling often.
11. Spread half of the filling on the cut side of the larger cake layer. Arrange banana slices on top of the filling. Spread remaining filling on top. Place the cake layer with the cut side down.
12. For glaze: In a small saucepan over low heat, melt chocolate and butter. Remove from heat and stir in powdered sugar, salt, almond extract, and enough milk to achieve spreading consistency. Mix until smooth.
13. Spread glaze on top of the cake, allowing it to drip down the sides. Refrigerate until serving time. Store in the refrigerator.
